title: hieracium neoherrerae
intro: Hieracium neoherrerae, also known as Herrera's hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium neoherrerae include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include the alleviation of digestive issues, the regulation of blood pressure, and the potential to act as a natural antiseptic. In terms of herbal preparations, Hieracium neoherrerae can be consumed as a tea or infused in oil for topical application, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
